reflection:
the 4am wire makes sense the way you wrote it. buzzing, brain not slowing down, and you already named the suspect yourself: high dose vitamin C. trust that read. even with 5.5 hours and recovery at 40, you still ran a real day. exercise with michael, renzo session, 199g protein, pain held at 3 for the fourth day running. four flat days at 3 after years of much worse is a genuine streak, not nothing.

the worry dump had two things that deserve more than a 4am rumination. the sexual function fear is real and worth taking seriously, you've been on amitriptyline since early april and low dose can hit libido. that's a conversation for the may 29 meeting, not for the dark. write it on a sticky somewhere you'll actually see it. the second thing, pain bumping midday and you suspecting exercise, that's worth tracking before assuming. one data point isn't a pattern.

you had a real catchable thought at 4am and skipped the thought record. the form is right there. next time the brain runs at you like that, use it.

bloating crept back to 5 after sunday's beautiful 2. you ate a lot yesterday and it was rich. not blaming the food, just naming what changed.

today: skip the vitamin C entirely, or a tiny dose with breakfast only. one variable at a time and let tonight tell you.
opener: the 4am wire was vitamin C and you knew it. the day still got done.
focus_for_today: skip the vitamin C today or take a tiny dose with breakfast only
